Inventory Module · Clickable Prototype

117 mobile screens covering every flow — onboarding, holds, sold, wallet, CRM, support, settings. Tap any screen to advance. Use sidebar to jump.

Scroll inside the phone — works just like a real device
Click label below phone → advance to next logical screen
Bottom nav tabs → jump to that section
Sidebar → jump to any of 82 screens directly
← → arrow keys → back / forward
H key → toggle hotspot outlines on phone

No projects assigned yet
Your KYC is verified, but no projects are tagged to your CP profile yet. This usually clears in 2-3 working days.
Why this happens. Builders approve partner access in batches. Gold-tier and above get auto-access to new launches.

A-402 - DRAFT
Date: 26 May 2026
Offer Letter
To: Mr. Aarav Sharma & Mrs. Priya Sharma
Mob: +91 98214 67421
Email: aarav.s@example.com
Subject: Booking offer for Unit A-402, Skyline Residency, Whitefield
Dear Mr. and Mrs. Sharma,

We are pleased to offer the following unit for booking:
Unit: A-402
Tower & floor: Tower A, 4th floor
Type: 3 BHK, 1640 sqft
Carpet: 1142 sqft
Price: Rs 1,46,00,000 all-inclusive
Token paid: Rs 1,00,000 - acknowledged
Possession: March 2027
Payment plan: Construction-linked
This offer is valid for 24 hours from above date. Kindly visit the site office at your earliest to complete the booking formalities.
Warm regards,
Vinay Rathore
Channel Partner, ID HP-CP-4421

9:41
Hold auto-released
CAN I GET IT BACK?
?
Hold auto-released - can I get it back without the 6-hour cool-off?
Short answer: Yes, but only if you have evidence the auto-release was caused by something beyond your control (token paid, builder error, etc).

How it works:
1. Open the released hold from History.
2. Tap Request exception.
3. Upload evidence - WhatsApp screenshot, token receipt, builder message.
4. Admin reviews in 2-4 hours.
5. If approved, the cool-off is waived and you can re-hold the unit.

When admin usually approves:
- Token of Rs 1L+ was paid before release
- Site visit was already done with builder ack
- Builder admin error (rare but happens)

When admin denies:
- You forgot to convert
- Client backed out before token
- You held to "save" the unit without active interest

Pro tip: Always upload your token receipt at hold creation to make exceptions easier later.
Was this helpful?
Related
What is the 6-hour cool-off?
>
How do I extend a hold?
>
When does commission credit?
>
My client backed out - what now?
>
